feed.title: Ankush Pratap Singh
feed.subtitle: This is the personal bio of Ankush Pratap Singh. I am a computer engineering graduate from New York University with a master's degree. My passion lies in the fields of machine learning, deep learning, and computer vision. With a strong interest in these areas, I strive to explore innovative applications and advancements that drive the future of technology. I am a prospective Phd student.

entry.title: 🎓 Celebrating the Completion of an Incredible Journey 🎉

link.title: 🎓 Celebrating the Completion of an Incredible Journey 🎉

entry.summary: When everyone was busy posing for photos after the graduation ceremony, I found myself rushing back home to put the final touches on my thesis report. Now that everything is done and dusted, I’m thrilled to share that I have successfully defended my thesis! 📚 Reflecting on this momentous occasion, I can’t help but reminisce about the incredible years I spent at NYU Tandon School of Engineering...

entry.title: Exciting News! Thesis Defense Success!
entry.summary: I am absolutely thrilled to announce that I have successfully defended my thesis! It is with immense joy and gratitude that I share this milestone in my academic journey. After months (and even years) of hard work, research, and dedication, I can finally say that I am officially a proud defender of my thesis! This momentous occasion marks the culmination of countless hours spent poring over li...

entry.title: Joined AI4CE lab
entry.summary: I am very happy to announce that I have joined AI4CE Lab (headed by Prof Chen Feng) and I’ll be doing my research under the guidance of Prof Chen Feng and Chao Chen (Phd student)starting Fall 2022. I’ll be working on the creation, modelling and analysis of different deep learning architectures for Scene Summarization project.

entry.title: Joined NYU Video Lab
entry.summary: I am very happy to announce that I have joined NYU Video Lab (headed by Prof Yao Wang) and I’ll be doing my research under the guidance of Prof Yao Wang and Chris Liu (Phd student)starting Fall 2022. I’ll be working on the creation, modelling and analysis of different deep learning architectures on NYUMets dataset.

entry.title: Starting my MS thesis
entry.summary: Starting Fall 2022, I will be starting my MS Thesis under the guidance of Prof Yao Wang(Departments of Electrical and Computer Engineering, and Biomedical Engineering) who heads the NYU Video Lab. I will be working on a project related to analysis of brain cancer using deep learning architectures. I aim to complete it before May 2023.
